items.title: Colombia votes in presidential election that could redefine relations with US
items.dek: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.
items.body: The election is held after months of public recrimination between current left-wing President Gustavo Petro and his US counterpart Donald Trump.

items.title: Japan defence minister denies militarism and criticises China's 'huge arsenal'
items.dek: Shinjiro Koizumi makes some of Tokyo's most pointed remarks yet in the dispute over Japan's military build-up.
items.body: Shinjiro Koizumi makes some of Tokyo's most pointed remarks yet in the dispute over Japan's military build-up.
